name: Mocheese Filled Tamales
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by mixing mashed silken tofu (4 oz), grated mochi cake (6 oz), white, yellow, or mellow miso paste (4 tbsp), and corn oil (4 tbsp) until smooth.
2. Fill and cook tamales according to "Tamales: Basic Procedure".
3. Per serving (2 tamales): 393 calories; 3 grams protein; 411 milligrams sodium; 67 grams carbohydrates; 10 grams fat; 0 mg cholesterol; 36 mg calcium.
